prestazioni: Crank the C7.5 S6 Avant's 4.0L TFSI V8 (engine code: **CEUC**) to 700 hp / 650 lb-ft via a **Vorsprung Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash** paired with **IE (Integrated Engineering) 83mm billet crankshaft**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.5:1 compression). Replace the stock turbos with **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II** twins, fed by **034 Motorsport billet compressor housings** and **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegates**. Upgrade the fuel system with **Bosch Motorsport 1,200cc injectors**, **AEM 400LPH in-tank pump**, and **Radium Engineering port injection kit** (methanol-compatible).

Swap the factory ZF 8HP70 transmission for a **ZF 8HP95X** (from the RS7) with a **South Bend twin-disc clutch** and **034 Motorsport billet torque converter** (3,800 RPM stall). Reinforce the drivetrain with an **034 Motorsport billet differential cover**, **Quattro GmbH RS6-spec rear diff** (3.08:1 ratio), and **Vorshlag Motorsport 100mm rear subframe bushings**. Cooling is handled by a **Setrab 50-row oil cooler** (front-mount) and **PWR 4-core intercooler** with **Vibrant Performance silicone couplers**.

Suspend the Avant on **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (C7.5-specific valving) with **034 Motorsport sway bars** (25mm front, 22mm rear) and **H&R monoball subframe collars**. Braking is upgraded to **AP Racing Radi-CAL 6-piston front calipers** (380mm discs) and **4-piston rear calipers** (356mm discs) with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge G-Stop braided lines**. Wheels are **HRE FF16** (20x10.5 ET35 front, 20x11 ET40 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** (275/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear).
estetica: Replace the stock front bumper with a **Prior Design PD800RS widebody kit** (carbon fiber, RS6-style vents) and **Vorshlag Motorsport carbon fiber front splitter** (30mm overhang). The rear gets a **Rocket Bunny V3 rear diffuser** (carbon fiber, 3D-printed endplates) and **Maxton Design GT-style rear bumper** with **OEM+ LED taillights** (smoked lenses). Side skirts are **ABT Sportsline RS6-R replicas** (carbon fiber, matte finish).

The roof is wrapped in **3M Matte Military Green** (color code: **343**) with **Vinyl Lab carbon fiber mirror caps** and **RS6-style side blades** (painted **Nardo Gray**). The grille is replaced with a **BMC carbon fiber mesh** (black, gloss finish) and **Audi Sport S6 badge delete** (replaced with **Vorsteiner carbon fiber emblem**). The exhaust exits via **Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium** (dual 102mm tips, quad-bridge design).

Interior upgrades include **Recaro Pole Position seats** (carbon fiber backs, Alcantara/leather) with **Schroth Profi II-6 harnesses**, **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (suede, 350mm, quick-release), and **AWE Track Edition pedal set** (aluminum, laser-etched). The dash is fitted with a **Motec C127 dash logger** (replaces the stock cluster) and **AEM X-Series wideband gauge** (mounted in the center vent). The cargo area gets a **Vogtland coilover cover** (carbon fiber) and **Thule Motion XT XXL roof box** (for spare wheels/tires).
